spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  price_date AS time,
  close_price AS "Brent Close"
FROM app.oil_prices
WHERE benchmark_code = 'BRENT'
ORDER BY price_date;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))::timestamp AS day,
    s.source_name,
    ap.sentiment_score,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(ap.relevance_score, 0), 1.0) AS weight
  FROM app.articles_raw ar
  JOIN app.sources s
    ON ar.source_id = s.source_id
  JOIN app.articles_processed ap
    ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
    AND ap.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      '$news_source' = '__all'
      OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
    )
)
SELECT
  day AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS article_count,
  CASE
    WHEN '$sentiment_metric' = 'weighted_avg_sentiment'
      THEN SUM(sentiment_score * weight) / NULLIF(SUM(weight), 0)
    ELSE AVG(sentiment_score)
  END AS sentiment_value
FROM base
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day;

WITH latest_run AS (
  SELECT model_run_id
  FROM app.model_runs
  WHERE model_name = '$model_name'
    AND run_status = 'completed'
  ORDER BY finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, model_run_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
recent_preds AS (
  SELECT
    p.prediction_for_date AS time,
    p.actual_close AS "Actual",
    p.predicted_close AS "Predicted"
  FROM app.predictions p
  JOIN latest_run lr
    ON p.model_run_id = lr.model_run_id
  WHERE p.actual_close IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY p.prediction_for_date DESC
  LIMIT 7
)
SELECT *
FROM recent_preds
ORDER BY time;

WITH latest_run AS (
  SELECT model_run_id
  FROM app.model_runs
  WHERE model_name = '$model_name'
    AND run_status = 'completed'
  ORDER BY finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, model_run_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
scored_preds AS (
  SELECT
    p.prediction_for_date,
    p.feature_date,
    p.predicted_close,
    p.actual_close,
    p.confidence_score,
    prev.close_price AS previous_close
  FROM app.predictions p
  LEFT JOIN app.oil_prices prev
    ON prev.price_date = p.feature_date
   AND prev.benchmark_code = p.benchmark_code
  WHERE p.model_run_id = (SELECT model_run_id FROM latest_run)
    AND p.actual_close IS NOT NULL
    AND p.predicted_close IS NOT NULL
    AND prev.close_price IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(prediction_for_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date",

  ROUND(previous_close::numeric, 2) AS "Previous Close",
  ROUND(predicted_close::numeric, 2) AS "Predicted",
  ROUND(actual_close::numeric, 2) AS "Actual",
  ROUND(ABS(predicted_close - actual_close)::numeric, 2) AS "Price Error",

  ROUND(((predicted_close / NULLIF(previous_close, 0)) - 1)::numeric * 100, 2)
    AS "Predicted Return %",

  ROUND(((actual_close / NULLIF(previous_close, 0)) - 1)::numeric * 100, 2)
    AS "Actual Return %",

  CASE
    WHEN predicted_close > previous_close THEN 'UP'
    WHEN predicted_close < previous_close THEN 'DOWN'
    ELSE 'FLAT'
  END AS "Predicted Direction",

  CASE
    WHEN actual_close > previous_close THEN 'UP'
    WHEN actual_close < previous_close THEN 'DOWN'
    ELSE 'FLAT'
  END AS "Actual Direction",

  CASE
    WHEN
      CASE
        WHEN predicted_close > previous_close THEN 1
        WHEN predicted_close < previous_close THEN -1
        ELSE 0
      END
      =
      CASE
        WHEN actual_close > previous_close THEN 1
        WHEN actual_close < previous_close THEN -1
        ELSE 0
      END
    THEN 'YES'
    ELSE 'NO'
  END AS "Direction Correct",

  ROUND(
    (
      COALESCE(
        confidence_score,
        LEAST(
          0.95,
          GREATEST(
            0.50,
            0.50 + ABS((predicted_close / NULLIF(previous_close, 0)) - 1) * 10
          )
        )
      ) * 100
    )::numeric,
    2
  ) AS "Confidence %"

FROM scored_preds
ORDER BY prediction_for_date DESC
LIMIT 30;

SELECT
  ROUND(mae::numeric, 2) AS "MAE",
  ROUND(rmse::numeric, 2) AS "RMSE"
FROM app.model_runs
WHERE model_name = '$model_name'
  AND run_status = 'completed'
ORDER BY finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, model_run_id DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))::timestamp AS day,
    ap.sentiment_score,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(ap.relevance_score, 0), 1.0) AS weight
  FROM app.articles_raw ar
  JOIN app.articles_processed ap
    ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
  JOIN app.sources s
    ON s.source_id = ar.source_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
    AND ap.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      '$news_source' = '__all'
      OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
    )
)
SELECT
  day AS time,
  AVG(sentiment_score) AS avg_sentiment,
  SUM(sentiment_score * weight) / NULLIF(SUM(weight), 0) AS weighted_sentiment
FROM base
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day;

SELECT
  DATE(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))::timestamp AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS article_count,
  AVG(ap.sentiment_score) AS avg_sentiment
FROM app.articles_raw ar
JOIN app.articles_processed ap
  ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
JOIN app.sources s
  ON s.source_id = ar.source_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
  AND ap.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    '$news_source' = '__all'
    OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
  )
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  s.source_name,
  COUNT(*) AS article_count
FROM app.articles_raw ar
JOIN app.articles_processed ap
  ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
JOIN app.sources s
  ON s.source_id = ar.source_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
  AND (
    '$news_source' = '__all'
    OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
  )
GROUP BY s.source_name
ORDER BY article_count DESC;

SELECT
  COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at) AS published_time,
  s.source_name,
  ar.title,
  ROUND(ap.sentiment_score::numeric, 3) AS sentiment_score,
  ROUND(ap.relevance_score::numeric, 3) AS relevance_score,
  ar.url
FROM app.articles_raw ar
JOIN app.articles_processed ap
  ON ap.article_id = ar.article_id
JOIN app.sources s
  ON s.source_id = ar.source_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(ar.published_date::timestamp, ar.published_at))
  AND ap.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL
  AND ap.sentiment_score <> 0
  AND (
    '$news_source' = '__all'
    OR s.source_name = '$news_source'
  )
ORDER BY ap.sentiment_score DESC
LIMIT 100;

spec.name: model_name
spec.label: Forecasting Model

spec.query:
SELECT DISTINCT model_name
FROM app.model_runs
WHERE run_status = 'completed'
ORDER BY model_name;

spec.name: news_source
spec.label: News Source

spec.query:
SELECT source_name
FROM app.sources
WHERE is_active = true
ORDER BY source_name;
